title: Partitioning Large SQL Tables
scenario: You are working with a large dataset that is stored in a SQL database. The data is too big to fit into memory, and queries are taking a long time to execute. You need to write a SQL query to create a partitioned table that will allow you to split the data into smaller, more manageable chunks.
constraints: Must use a range-based partitioning strategy
Must account for the storage requirements of the partitioned table

evaluationCriteria.description: Is the proposed partitioning strategy optimal for the given data?
Does the proposed partitioning strategy account for storage requirements?
Does the proposed partitioning strategy improve query execution time?
Is the proposed partitioning strategy overly complex?
